title: More Spear Enchantments
description: more enchantments for the newly added spear from the Mounts of Mayhem update.
body:
> The Fabric & NeoForge mod REQUIRES the Architectury API This mod adds enchantments that work only with the new spears. More Spear Enchantments, well adds more enchants for the spear, you can get these enchantments either through the enchanting table or with a enchanted book and anvil.
⚡ Thundering Call down the power of storms! When you strike an enemy with an enchanted spear, lightning bolts strike at their location. - **Max Level**: III - **Effect**: Strikes lightning on hit targets - **Scaling**: Higher levels increase the chance of lightning strikes (40% → 60% → 80%) - **Works in**: All dimensions
💀 Withering - **Max Level**: III - **Effect**: Applies Wither status effect to hit targets - **Scaling**: Higher levels increase both duration and potency - Level I: Wither I for 2.5 seconds - Level II: Wither II for 5 seconds - Level III: Wither III for 7.5 seconds
🧪 Poisoning - **Max Level**: III - **Effect**: Applies Poison status effect to hit targets - **Scaling**: Higher levels increase both duration and potency - Level I: Poison I for 2.5 seconds - Level II: Poison II for 5 seconds - Level III: Poison III for 7.5 seconds
🩼 Crippling - **Max Level**: III - **Effect**: Applies Slowness & Weakness status effect to hit targets - **Scaling**: Higher levels increase both duration and potency - Level I: Poison I for 2.5 seconds - Level II: Poison II for 5 seconds - Level III: Poison III for 7.5 seconds
🩸 Vampiric Steal health from your enemies, and heal yourself - **Max Level**: III - **Effect**: Heals the player on hit - **Scaling**: Higher levels increase healing amount - Level I: 50% lifesteal - Level II: 100% lifesteal - Level III: 150% lifesteal
💥 Explosive Explosive Spear?! - **Max Level**: III - **Effect**: Chance to create explosion on hit - **Scaling**: Higher levels increase both chance and power - Level I: 10% chance, 1.5 power - Level II: 20% chance, 2.0 power - Level III: 30% chance, 2.5 power - **Other**: No block breaking or fire damage
## How to Use 1. Obtain a spear 2. Enchant it using an enchanting table, anvil, or enchanted books (from either villagers or the Wandering villager trades, and treasure loot.) These custom enchantments only work on spears. ## License Licensed under the MIT License. See the project repository for full license text. ## Links - **Source Code**: [Gitea Repository](https://git.sillyangel.dev/angel/more-spear-enchants) - **Author**: [sillyangel](https://sillyangel.dev/) - **Issues**: Report bugs or request features on the [issue tracker](https://git.sillyangel.dev/angel/more-spear-enchants/issues) --- *made by sillyangel*
